settings.overview: Displays synced lyrics in the bar and desktop widget, following the active media player.
settings.advance-description: Shift lyrics forward or backward to match your player latency.
settings.timeout-description: Abort a lyrics request after this many milliseconds.
settings.bar-width-description: Maximum width used by the bar widget before the lyric starts scrolling.
settings.bar-hide-description: Collapse the bar widget when there is no active track.
settings.bar-dot-description: Display the animated state indicator at the start of the bar widget.
settings.current-track-description: Track metadata currently exposed by MediaService.
settings.current-state-description: Current fetch and parser state inside the plugin.

desktop.context-description: How many lines before and after the current lyric are visible.
desktop.font-size-description: Base font size for the highlighted lyric line.
desktop.opacity-description: Opacity used by non-highlighted lyric lines.
desktop.meta-description: Display song title and artist above the lyric block.
desktop.hide-description: Hide the desktop widget when no playable track is active.
desktop.background-description: Use Noctalia's desktop widget surface behind the lyrics.
desktop.corners-description: Apply rounded clipping to the desktop widget container.
desktop.align-description: Choose how lyrics are aligned inside the widget.
